articles.title: GCCH USERS ONLY - Microsoft 365 Outlook Copilot - FAQ
symptoms: Copilot not showing
Copilot greyed out
AI features missing
steps: Confirm you are on a GCCH tenant and licensed for Copilot.
Verify Outlook is updated to the latest supported build.
Sign out and sign back into Microsoft 365.
If Copilot still does not appear, contact IT with your Outlook version.

articles.title: [Email Security] I do not receive emails from outside of GE Vernova
symptoms: Missing external mail
Sender says email was sent but I never got it
steps: Check Junk Email folder and Quarantine notifications in Microsoft 365 security portal.
Ask the sender to verify the exact recipient address (no typos, correct domain).
Confirm the sender domain is not blocked by organizational security policy.
If mail is quarantined, release it or request an allow-list via IT security.

articles.title: [Email] - Create a New Distribution List
symptoms: Need new DL
Create group mailbox
steps: Open the distribution list request portal or service catalog.
Provide list name, owners, and members.
Submit the request and wait for approval/provisioning.
Verify the new DL appears in Outlook address book after sync.

articles.title: [Email] How to download the Offline Address Book (OAB)
symptoms: Contacts missing offline
GAL not updating
OAB download failed
steps: In Outlook, go to Send/Receive > Download Address Book.
Choose the correct Offline Address Book for your organization and click OK.
Restart Outlook if the download does not complete within 30 minutes.
Check network/VPN if OAB download repeatedly fails.
